examples: His resignation was greeted by jubilation on the streets of Sofia.
Sofia looked around at all the faces: she had the impression that she had seen most of the guests before.
Sofia was intending to call on Miss Kitts.
Francis Coppola's winery markets the Sofia Mini, a sparkling wine sold in a metallic pink can.
Sofia Vergara showed off her famous curves in an aquamarine glittering body-hugging gown from Zuhair Murad.
